## Knowledge System

| File | Role | Read When |
|------|------|-----------|
| `bootstrap.md` | Canonical technical reference — architecture, models, commands, naming | Always, before any work |
| `memory.md` | Project decisions, milestones, open questions | Always, before any work |
| `docs/wiki/architecture.md` | Deep architecture: DB routing, auth flows, policy engine internals | Major architectural changes |
| `docs/wiki/api.md` | REST API reference — all agent-facing endpoints | REST API changes |
| `docs/wiki/policies.md` | Policy type catalogue and evaluation logic | Policy engine changes |
| `docs/wiki/compliance.md` | Compliance framework mappings (SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, EU AI Act, NIST) | Compliance feature changes |
| `docs/wiki/sdk.md` | SDK integration guide | SDK-related work |
| `docs/wiki/development.md` | Development setup and contribution guide | Onboarding, dev environment |

<!-- END BOOTSTRAP-PRIMER -->

---

## Rules (RFC 2119)

Terms: **MUST** = required. **MUST NOT** = prohibited. **SHOULD** = strongly recommended. **MAY** = optional.

### Stack

- Stack: Django 5.0 backend, Next.js 14 App Router frontend, Graphene GraphQL, Celery, PostgreSQL, Redis.
- You MUST work on `main` — no PRs or branches needed for agent commits.

### Backend

- You MUST run the pre-commit validation checklist from `bootstrap.md` before every backend commit.
- You MUST define GraphQL types before any Query or Mutation that references them. Forward references crash startup.
- You MUST NOT create foreign keys to external models. `tenant_id` is always an opaque string.
- You MUST NOT query any model without filtering by `tenant_id`.

### Commit hygiene

- You MUST NOT include co-authorship or AI attribution messages in commits.
- You MUST NOT rebase or force-push.

---

## Pre-Commit Checklist (Backend)

```bash
# 1. Django startup check
cd backend && pipenv run python -c \
  "import django, os; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'config.settings'); django.setup()"

# 2. Migration check
pipenv run python manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run

# 3. Tests + lint
pipenv run pytest
pipenv run flake8
pipenv run isort --check-only .
```

STOP on any failure before committing.

---

- Internal Calliope deployment wiring: see `calliope.md` (gitignored, not in this repo).
- Managed-cloud-only features (billing, secrets, team, deployments) are intentionally stubbed in standalone mode.
